keywordGapSubtitle: Find Keywords your Wettbewerber rank for that you don't
keywordGapNoCompetitorsHint: Hinzufügen Wettbewerber to discover Keyword opportunities
keywordGapSelectPrompt: Select a Wettbewerber to view Keyword gaps
keywordGapBulkActions: Bulk actions will be available soon
overlapEmpty: Hinzufügen Wettbewerber and monitor Keywords to see overlap data
tooltipPriorityDesc: Overall Priorität based on opportunity Score and search Volumen
tooltipScoreDesc: Opportunity Score (0-100) combining Volumen, Schwierigkeit, and Wettbewerber Position
tooltipEstTrafficDesc: Estimated monthly Traffic you could capture by ranking for this Keyword
tooltipDifficultyDesc: How hard it is to rank for this Keyword (0-100)
reportTooltipKeywordDesc: The Keyword phrase analyzed in the report
reportTooltipStatusDesc: Current processing Status of the report
reportTooltipAvgPosDesc: Durchschnittlich SERP Position across top results
reportTooltipTopUrlDesc: The highest ranking URL for this Keyword
contentAnalysisSubtitle: Compare on-page SEO metrics with Wettbewerber pages
removeCompetitorConfirm: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie remove this Wettbewerber? It will be hidden from tracking.
removeCompetitorsConfirm: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie remove {count} Wettbewerber(s)?
contentGapSectionSubtitle: Identify Keyword opportunities where Wettbewerber rank but you don't
contentGapSectionTooltip: Inhalt gap analysis compares your Keyword rankings with Wettbewerber to find opportunities you're missing.
competitorOverviewNoCompetitorsHint: Hinzufügen Wettbewerber to compare rankings over time
competitorOverviewNoDataHint: Check Wettbewerber Positionen to populate the chart
gapTrendsEmpty: Nein trend data yet. Run content gap analysis to start tracking.
addCompetitorSubtitle: Discover Wettbewerber from your data or add one manually
addCompetitorSerpDesc: Domains that rank for your monitored Keywords.
addCompetitorSerpEmpty: Nein Wettbewerber found in SERP data yet
addCompetitorSerpEmptyHint: Monitor more Keywords to discover Wettbewerber
addCompetitorSuggestDesc: Domains that compete for the same organic Keywords as you.
addCompetitorManualDesc: Enter a Wettbewerber Domain to add it directly.
addCompetitorManualDomainNote: Enter the Domain without http:// or www.
contentGapDetailScoreBreakdownDesc: The opportunity Score (0-100) is calculated from three factors: search Volumen potential, Keyword Schwierigkeit, and Wettbewerber ranking Position.
contentGapDetailVolumeDesc: Based on {volume} monatliche Suchanfragen. Higher Volumen = more points (up to 50).
contentGapDetailDifficultyDesc: Schwierigkeit is {difficulty}/100 ({label}). Lower Schwierigkeit = more points.
contentGapDetailWhoRanksDesc: Shows which Wettbewerber currently ranks for this Keyword, their Position, and the specific URL that ranks.
contentGapDetailNoRankingDesc: You currently have no ranking for this Keyword. This is a pure content gap — creating a dedicated page could capture this Traffic.
contentGapDetailWhatToDoDesc: Actionable recommendations based on Keyword Schwierigkeit, search Volumen, Wettbewerber Position, and your current ranking Status.
recEasyWinDesc: Niedrig Schwierigkeit Keyword — create a well-optimized page targeting this phrase. With quality content and basic on-page SEO, you can rank relatively quickly.
recModerateEffortDesc: Mittel Schwierigkeit — build comprehensive, in-depth content with strong internal linking. Consider creating a pillar page covering this topic thoroughly.
recHighCompetitionDesc: Difficult Keyword — build topical authority first by targeting related easier Keywords. Then create pillar content backed by quality Backlinks.
recHighValueTargetDesc: Your Wettbewerber ranks in the top 3 for this high-Volumen Keyword. Study their content structure, word count, and Backlink profile to create something better.
recSignificantTrafficDesc: Hoch search Volumen Keyword. Even ranking in Positionen 5-10 could drive substantial organic Traffic to your site.
recCreateNewContentDesc: You have no rankings for this Keyword yet. Create a dedicated, optimized page targeting this specific topic and search intent.
recImproveExistingDesc: You currently rank at Position {position}. Update and improve your existing page — add more depth, better structure, and relevant internal links.
recQuickContentPieceDesc: Niedrig Volumen but very easy to rank for. Gut for building topical coverage and internal linking structure.
generateReportConfirmation: This will run all analyses and collect data into a downloadable PDF:
generateReportStepBacklinks: Run Wettbewerber Backlink analysis (if data is stale)
generateReportStepCollect: Collect all metrics into a downloadable PDF
generateReportFreshDataNote: Fresh data (less than 24h old) will be reused. This may take a few minutes.
reportProfileQuickDesc: Executive summary with health Score and key metrics
reportProfileStandardDesc: Core analysis: Keywords, Backlinks, and Inhalt-Lücken
reportEditorDragHint: Drag sections to reorder, toggle to include/exclude
gapSummaryTotalGapsTooltip: Gesamt Keywords where at least one Wettbewerber ranks but you don't. More gaps = more untapped opportunities.
gapSummaryHighPriorityTooltip: Gaps scored 70+ von 100, indicating high search Volumen, low Schwierigkeit, or Wettbewerber ranking in top Positionen. Best opportunities to pursue first.
gapSummaryEstTrafficTooltip: Estimated monatliche Besuche you could gain by ranking for all gap Keywords. Calculated assuming ~30% click-through rate for top Positionen.
gapSummaryCompetitorsTooltip: Number of unique Wettbewerber Domains analyzed in the content gap comparison.
gapComparisonTooltip: Compares how many Inhalt-Lücken each Wettbewerber contributes. Wettbewerber with many high-Priorität gaps likely target topics you are missing entirely.
overlapSummary: {totalKeywords} Keywords across {competitorCount} Wettbewerber(s) · You rank for {youRanking}
overlapNoMatchHint: Passen Sie Ihre Suche oder Filter an.
contentGapNoCompetitorsHint: Hinzufügen Wettbewerber to discover content gap opportunities
contentGapDescription: Keywords where Wettbewerber rank but you don't. Higher scores indicate easier wins with more Traffic potential.
contentGapNoOpportunitiesHint: Run content gap analysis to find opportunities
tooltipKeywordDesc: The search phrase that represents this content gap opportunity.
tooltipCompetitorDesc: The Wettbewerber Domain that currently ranks for this Keyword.
tooltipScoreFullDesc: Weighted Score (0-100): search Volumen (up to 50pts) + Schwierigkeit bonus (up to 50pts) + Position bonus (+20 for top 3, +10 for top 10). Higher is better.
tooltipVolumeDesc: Durchschnittlich monthly search Volumen for this Keyword. Higher Volumen means more potential Traffic.
tooltipDifficultyFullDesc: Keyword Schwierigkeit Score (0-100). Lower values indicate easier Keywords to rank for. Based on Backlink profiles of current top results.
tooltipCompPosDesc: The Position where the Wettbewerber currently ranks for this Keyword in search results.
tooltipStatusFullDesc: Identifiziert = newly found, Überwachung = being tracked, Ranking = you now rank, Verworfen = not relevant.
tooltipPriorityFullDesc: Automatically assigned based on opportunity Score: Hoch (70+), Mittel (40-69), Niedrig (below 40).
reportsEmptyDesc: Create reports from Keyword Überwachung to analyze Wettbewerber content strategies and get actionable recommendations.
reportsTooltipKeyword: The target Keyword this analysis was created for
reportsTooltipCompetitors: Number of Wettbewerber pages analyzed for this Keyword
reportsTooltipAvgWords: Durchschnittlich word count across analyzed Wettbewerber pages
reportsTooltipAvgH2: Durchschnittlich number of H2 headings used by Wettbewerber pages
reportsTooltipAvgImages: Durchschnittlich number of images used by Wettbewerber pages
contentAnalysisNoCompetitorsHint: Hinzufügen Wettbewerber above to analyze their page content
contentAnalysisNoDataHint: Click "Analyze Seite" to fetch Wettbewerber page analysis
contentAnalysisSelectPrompt: Select a Wettbewerber and Keyword to view content analysis
contentAnalysisNotRanking: Nicht gerankt or no analysis available
contentAnalysisInsightWordsAdd: Consider adding {count} more words to match Wettbewerber depth
contentAnalysisInsightH2Add: Hinzufügen {count} more H2 headings for better structure
contentAnalysisPageAnalysisStarted: Seite analysis started — results will appear shortly
recIncreaseContentDesc: Wettbewerber average {avgWords} words. {gap, select, positive {Add ~{gapWords} more words.} other {Your content is shorter.}}
recIncreaseContentStep1: Expand existing sections with more detail
recImproveHeadingsDesc: Wettbewerber use an average of {count} H2 headings. Hinzufügen more section headings.
recImproveHeadingsStep1: Break content into clear sections with H2 tags
recAddImagesDesc: Wettbewerber use an average of {count} images. Visual content improves engagement.
recAddImagesStep1: Hinzufügen relevant images to each section
recAddImagesStep2: Use alt text with target Keywords
recBuildBacklinksDesc: Analyze where Wettbewerber get their Backlinks and target similar sources.
recBuildBacklinksStep1: Review Wettbewerber Backlink sources in report
recBuildBacklinksStep2: Reach out to top verweisende Domains
createReportSelectHint: Select 1-3 Wettbewerber from SERP to analyze what makes them rank well
createReportFetchSerpFirst: Fetch SERP data for this Keyword first
clickToDiscoverCompetitors: Klicken Sie unten, um zu entdecken your organic search Wettbewerber
positionScatterDescription: Your Position vs Wettbewerber Position per Keyword. Points below the diagonal = you rank better.
backlinkRadarDescription: Normalized Backlink metrics comparison across your Domain and Wettbewerber (0-100 scale).
backlinkQualityDescription: Backlinks grouped by referring Domain rank tier (DR).
keywordBarsDescription: Position comparison for your highest-Volumen Keywords. Lower Position number = better ranking.
contentGapBubbleDescription: Gap Keywords plotted by Schwierigkeit vs search Volumen. Bubble size = Wettbewerber ranking. Color = opportunity Score.
winRateDescription: Keyword ranking wins, ties, and losses vs each Wettbewerber.
